claimText: The Global Forest Resources Assessment (GFRA) is released by the Food and Agriculture Organization (FAO) every five years.
evidenceExcerpt: The Global Forest Resources Assessment (GFRA) is released by the FAO every 5 years.
examUse: Statement-based question on reports and publishing organizations.

claimText: The Global Forest Observations Initiative (GFOI) is a flagship programme of the Group on Earth Observations (GEO), of which India is a member.
evidenceExcerpt: The Global Forest Observations Initiative (GFOI) is a flagship programme of the Group on Earth Observations (GEO), of which India is a member.
examUse: Statement-based question on international initiatives and India's membership.
distractorHooks: India is not a member of GEO
GFOI is a flagship programme of UNEP

claimText: Forests cover 32 percent of the global land area, with nearly half of the world's forests located in the tropics.
evidenceExcerpt: Forests cover 32% of the global land area, with nearly half located in the tropics.
examUse: Statement-based question on global forest distribution.
distractorHooks: Majority of forests are in temperate regions
Forests cover over 50 percent of global land area

claimText: Europe has the largest forest area globally, accounting for 25 percent of the world's total forest area.
evidenceExcerpt: Europe has the largest forest area, accounting for 25% of the world's total.
examUse: Comparison question on regional forest cover.
distractorHooks: South America has the largest forest area
Asia accounts for the largest share of global forests

claimText: India ranks 9th globally in total forest area, accounting for 2 percent of the global forest area.
evidenceExcerpt: India ranks 9th globally in total forest area (accounting for 2% of global forest area)
examUse: Statement-based question on India's global standing in forest cover.
distractorHooks: India ranks in the top 5 globally for forest area
India accounts for 5 percent of global forest area

claimText: India ranks 5th globally in terms of rubber plantations.
evidenceExcerpt: Ranks 5th in terms of rubber plantation.
examUse: Statement-based question on India's agricultural and plantation rankings.
distractorHooks: India ranks 1st globally in rubber plantations
India is the largest producer of natural rubber
